name: Low-Fat Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Skim Milk, or soy milk
1/2 cup Lowfat Cheddar Cheese, shredded, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the potatoes.
2. In a saucepan, combine milk, flour, salt, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper. Cook over medium heat until the sauce thickens.
3. Add onions to the sauce.
4. Layer potato slices in a casserole dish.
5. Spoon half of the sauce over the potato slices.
6. Repeat with remaining potatoes and sauce.
7. Cover and bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 65 minutes.
8. Optional: Remove from the oven and sprinkle with low-fat cheddar cheese.
